text: I feel as if I am inside a modern institution dedicated to innovation and technology. The bright, open meeting room whispers of structured dialogue and purposeful exchange, yet its emptiness offers a silent anticipation. Stepping to the vibrant R&D (research and development) display engenders a sense of curiosity and hope, almost as if knowledge itself is becoming tangible. I am surrounded by promise, invention, and the quiet hum of potential collaboration, yet I remain slightly detached—an observer-citizen inside the temple of human progress.
